title: Sass & Belle Recycled Glass Vintage Bud Vase Pale Pink - Set of 3 - Small Glass Vases for Flowers, Vintage Table Decor for Home, Elegant Flower Vase Set, Mini Table Decorations
features: Beautiful Vintage Design: These Sass & Belle recycled glass bud vases feature elegant, vintage-inspired shapes in a soft pink finish—perfect for adding charm to your flower vases collection and home decor.
Set of 3 Unique Glass Vases: Each set includes three individually shaped small glass vases, ideal for displaying single stems, making them great for table decorations or gifts for plant lovers.
Eco-Friendly & Recycled: Crafted from recycled glass, these bud vases offer a sustainable choice for home decoration, combining eco-conscious living with elegant, timeless style.
Perfect for Table Decor: Whether you're decorating for weddings, parties, or enhancing everyday table decor, these mini vases serve as versatile, stylish flower holders or centrepieces.

A Thoughtful Gift Idea: An ideal gift for birthdays, housewarmings, or Mother's Day, these pretty pink vases are a charming choice for anyone who loves flower vases, vintage home accessories, or small glass décor.
description: Add a touch of elegance and sustainability to your home décor with the Sass & Belle Recycled Glass Vintage Bud Vase Set in Pale Pink. This charming trio of glass vases is made from recycled materials, offering a more eco-friendly way to enjoy home styling. Each bud vase in the set has its own distinct shape, ranging from soft curves to classic silhouettes, and all are beautifully finished in a pastel pink glaze that adds a subtle pop of colour to any room. Perfect as a centrepiece or as an accent on a shelf, mantle, or side table, these mini vases are designed to showcase individual flowers or small bunches, making them ideal for table decorations and floral displays. They can also be used as part of wedding decor or for seasonal arrangements around the home. Whether you're searching for a small glass vase to complement your existing flower vases or want to create a beautiful vignette with multiple mini vases, this set provides endless styling possibilities. A fantastic option for lovers of vintage aesthetics, they also make a wonderful gift for housewarmings, birthdays, or as a thoughtful present for someone who adores unique table decor. Bring delicate charm and sustainability together with these stylish Sass & Belle recycled glass vases—perfect for table decor, flower displays, or gifting with love.
